bosses.name: Epic Ghost of Skuld

attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (green-grass arena, 151-693s): SUMMON-ONLY / WAVE-BASED — the boss summons successive WAVES of foes (a blue wraith 'mighty foe', then crowds of red/dark enemies) rather than firing a fixed bullet pattern itself; wave foes have their own sparse spread. Reconstructed: summon-only wave-survival.
minions: wave foes: a blue wraith/'mighty foe' + crowds of red/dark enemies (per wave)
